name: field-name-normalization
question: How should snake_case database columns map to camelCase MST properties?
decision: Add normalizeRow() utility in execution/utils.ts that converts snake_case keys to camelCase. PostgresBackend calls this on each row before returning. DDL generator already does camelCase->snake_case for column names.
rationale: Keeps normalization logic centralized. Schema properties use camelCase (JSON/JS convention), database columns use snake_case (SQL convention). Bidirectional mapping maintains consistency.
